title: Capability Token Wire Format (JWS Compact Serialization)
description: JWS Compact Serialization string: BASE64URL(protected_header).BASE64URL(payload).BASE64URL(signature). Three dot-separated base64url segments. The protected header MUST decode to capability-token-protected-header schema; payload MUST decode to capability-token-claims schema; signature MUST be 86 base64url chars (64-byte raw R||S for ES256). Decoded views are validated separately. alg=none is FORBIDDEN.
